description_long: This object consists of three distinct bottles grouped together, each with a unique geometric shape and color. The largest bottle is teal with a black cap and a polygonal body, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The medium bottle is blue with a brown, square-shaped cap, and has a more slender, angular form. The smallest bottle is a dark reddish-brown with a textured, lattice-patterned surface and a tall, conical amber cap, resembling a decorative or artisanal container. The surfaces of the bottles are mostly matte, with the exception of the lattice-patterned bottle, which has a slightly glossy finish. No visible labels or branding are present on any of the bottles. The group appears suitable for use as personal containers for liquids, such as water, beverages, or specialty oils.
description: A group of three visually distinct bottles: one teal with a black cap, one blue with a brown cap, and one dark red with a textured lattice pattern and amber cone cap.
description_view_0: The front view shows all three bottles, with the lattice-patterned bottle and its amber cone cap most prominent, flanked by the teal and blue bottles.
description_view_1: From this angle, the teal bottle is most visible, with the blue bottle in front and the lattice-patterned bottle partially obscured behind.
description_view_2: The teal bottle dominates the left, the blue bottle is centered, and the lattice-patterned bottle is fully visible on the right.
description_view_3: The lattice-patterned bottle with its amber cone cap is in the foreground, with the teal and blue bottles behind it.
